title: Penitentiary
writer: Martin Flavin, Seton I. Miller, Fred Niblo Jr.
actors: Walter Connolly, John Howard, Jean Parker
plot: A District Attorney becomes a Prison Warden, and finds himself overseeing the sentence of a meek man who he'd once prosecuted as the D.A.. He discovers his new job is more complex than he'd thought, especially with this meek priso...
